task: I need to send a quick note to my supervisor about a schedule change that came up today. Can you help me put it into a clear message that would be easy to read and send?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — use this:

**“Hi [Name], my schedule changed today and I won’t be able to make my usual shift. Please let me know what works.”**

Shorter:

**“Hi [Name], my schedule changed today and I need to adjust my hours. Let me know what works.”**

If you want, I can make it sound a little more like a **text** or a **work email**.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, close enough. But I’d want it to say I’m still available, just not at the usual time. Something like:

"Hi [Name], my schedule changed today, so I can’t make my usual shift. I’m still able to work, just need to adjust the time. Let me know what works."

Make it a little more direct, less fluffy.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a cleaner version:

**“Hi [Name], my schedule changed today, so I can’t make my usual shift. I’m still available to work, just need to adjust the time. Let me know what works.”**

Shorter:

**“Hi [Name], my schedule changed today, so I can’t make my usual shift. I’m still available, just need to adjust the time.”**

If you want, I can make it even more like a **quick text**.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. The first one’s fine. Plain and clear.
